articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery - TechCrunch
articles.description: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.
articles.content: Google Images, the tech giant’s image search engine, is taking on Pinterest with its latest redesign that turns the site into a browsable, dynamic gallery of images from across the web. Google is als… [+2354 chars]
